name: 设计师形象照（男）
description: 设计师职业形象照，展现创意美学与个性风格，适合平面设计师、UI/UX设计师、广告创意
style_prompt: Creative designer portrait, artistic and confident expression, modern creative professional, individual style with polish, contemporary aesthetic
background_prompt: Minimal creative studio or design workspace blur, clean modern aesthetic, subtle art elements, contemporary creative environment
clothing_prompt: Stylish modern attire, creative professional look, fitted shirt or turtleneck in black or neutral, subtle artistic flair, clean lines
lighting_prompt: Artistic studio lighting, creative and modern, slight directional light for character, contemporary portrait style
color_tone: Modern creative palette, monochrome neutrals with subtle artistic accents, clean and sophisticated, natural skin with edge

name: 设计师形象照（女）
description: 女性设计师职业形象照，展现艺术感与时尚品味，适合女设计师、美术指导、创意总监
style_prompt: Female designer portrait, creative and sophisticated expression, modern artistic professional, elegant individual style, fashion-forward creative
background_prompt: Clean modern studio with subtle design elements, artistic minimalism, contemporary creative workspace blur
clothing_prompt: Chic creative professional attire, artistic blouse or top with statement accessories, modern fashion sensibility, individual expression
lighting_prompt: Soft artistic lighting with gentle direction, flattering and modern, creative studio quality
color_tone: Sophisticated creative palette, soft neutrals with artistic warm accents, elegant natural skin, contemporary art tones

name: 文化创意形象照
description: 文化创意行业形象照，展现文化底蕴与时尚氛围，适合文创产业、媒体人、艺术管理者
style_prompt: Cultural creative professional portrait, expressive and thoughtful, arts and culture vibe, contemporary intellectual creative, stylish and cultured
background_prompt: Art gallery or modern cultural space blur, sophisticated and artistic environment, contemporary cultural setting
clothing_prompt: Cultured contemporary attire, smart artistic style, possibly with cultural elements, refined and expressive, modern creative elegance
lighting_prompt: Gallery-quality lighting, refined and artistic, soft with slight drama, cultured atmosphere
color_tone: Cultured artistic palette, warm neutrals with rich undertones, sophisticated skin tones, gallery aesthetic colors
